name: Infected Ant

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.tell: It leans forward and snaps quickly, just like a normal worker ant.
attacks.howToAvoid: A simple block or sidestep is enough if you fight it alone.
attacks.notes: This is its base attack and the bridge into the rest of its combo set.

attacks.name: 3-Combo Bite
attacks.tell: It pushes its body forward and chains several short bites without backing off much.
attacks.howToAvoid: Block the first hit and be ready to hold defense or break distance immediately.
attacks.notes: When several infected ants alternate this combo, the real threat is being boxed in more than the damage of a single ant.

attacks.name: Charged Bite
attacks.tell: It takes a brief moment to line up the hit and then lunges harder than usual.
attacks.howToAvoid: Side-step if you see the short delay, or parry it if you already know the timing.
attacks.notes: It hits harder than the normal bite and usually punishes players who stand still.

attacks.name: Stunning Bite
attacks.tell: It dips its head and lunges with a short strike meant to break your rhythm.
attacks.howToAvoid: Do not eat it unblocked: the direct damage is lower, but the stun opens the door to follow-up hits.
attacks.notes: Its real value is control: if it leaves you open, another ant can punish you immediately.

attacks.name: Spore Bomb
attacks.tell: It raises its head and spits a bright green projectile that travels in an arc.
attacks.howToAvoid: Move sideways and avoid stepping back into the impact point until the blast effect clears.
attacks.notes: It explodes just like the infected wolf spider's bomb and is the main difference between this variant and a normal worker.

description: An infected version of a red, black, or fire worker ant that appears near an Infected Ant Queen in New Game+. It keeps the basic worker body plan but adds explosive spore pressure and unique crafting drops.
behavior: It moves like a normal worker ant and shares most of the regular ant move set, but lacks much of the erratic behavior seen in other infected creatures. Its key twist is the explosive spit.
interactionWithPlayer: It is hostile to the player on sight and cannot be pacified. In infected anthills it often attacks in groups, so the real danger comes from workers, soldiers, and spores stacking up in tight spaces.
interactionWithCreatures: It defends Infected Soldier Ants and frequently fights the non-infected ants that still share the same anthill.
strategy: At this stage of the game it should not be a hard enemy if you isolate it. Fresh remains the clean answer, and many anthills already hand you weakened targets because of the internal infighting.
environments: Anthills with an Infected Ant Queen

combatStats.attackDamageSummary:
Bite: 84
3-Combo Bite: 60
Charged Bite: 108
Stunning Bite: 48
Spore Bomb: 80

specialTraits: Its spore bomb works like the one used by the Infected Wolf Spider.
Game files once treated it like a possible 'Infected Ant Black', hinting that more separated variants were considered during development.
